fix.item: Fixed package, component, and plugin display names so Joomla shows readable extension names during uninstall instead of language constants.
Normalized extension names in Joomla's extensions table during install and update.
Updated the minimum PHP requirement to 8.3.0 for Joomla 6.x compatibility.

change.item: Improved package metadata consistency for Joomla Extension Manager.

fix.item: Improved URL sanitization for generated button, card, and file links.
Prevented plugins from being force-enabled again during package updates.
Unified changelog metadata paths across extension manifests.

change.item: Moved dashboard status logic into a dedicated Joomla MVC model.
Made the dashboard status visibility option functional.

fix.item: Avoided a JAMSS false positive by removing the literal embed element signature from the content plugin source while keeping the same frontend output.

addition.item: Cleaned the admin dashboard for stable MVP release.

change.item: Removed future roadmap text from the dashboard.
